characters.name: Amy Abbott
characters.description: Amy AbbottBiographyFull NameAmy Nicole AbbottAliasesGrover(by friends)Private(byEdna)BirthdateSeptember 16, 1987StatusIn a relationship withEphram BrownFamilyHarold Abbott(father)Rose Abbott(mother)Bright Abbott(older brother)Edna Harper(grandmother)Hal Abbott(grandfather)†Linda Abbott(aunt)†Irv Harper(grandfather)†Carol Roberts(grandmother)Herb Roberts(grandfather)RomancesEphram Brown(boyfriend)Colin Hart(ex-boyfriend)†Rick Walzak(dated)Tommy Callahan(dated)Reid Bardem(ex-boyfriend)OccupationStudent atCounty High SchoolWaiter(summer 2003)Waiter atSam's Gourmet Deli and Market(2006)ResidenceEverwood, Colorado,United StatesSeries InformationSeasons1•2•3•4Episodes88(+1credited)First1.01:"Pilot"Last4.22:"Foreverwood (Part 2)"Portrayed byEmily VanCampAmy Abbottis a main character in thefirst,second,thirdandfourthseasons ofthe WBdrama seriesEverwood. She is the daughter ofHaroldandRose Abbott, and her older brother isBright Abbott. She is portrayed byEmily VanCamp. Amy Abbott is the youngest child of Dr.Harold Abbottand his wifeRose, and alsoBright's younger sister. Amy is a classic girl-next-door with a twist. She is obsessive and tends to overdo things. She's very talkative, has a good heart and she's a good friend. She has strong opinions and a good sense of humor, and always ends up doing the right thing in the end. characters.name: Andrew Brown
characters.description: Andrew BrownBiographyFull NameAndy(by everyone)BirthdateDecember 1, 1952GenderMaleStatusWidowedFamilyJulia Brown(wife)†Ephram Brown(son)Delia Brown(daughter)Jacob Hoffman(father-in-law)Ruth Hoffman(mother-in-law)RomancesJulia Brown(former wife)†Linda Abbott(dated)†Amanda Hayes(dated)OccupationNeurosurgeon(former)Doctor atBrown & Abbott Medical PracticeSeries InformationSeasons1•2•3•4Episodes89First1.01:"Pilot"Last4.22:"Foreverwood (Part 2)"Portrayed byTreat WilliamsDr. Andrew "Andy" Brownis a main character in every season ofthe WBdrama seriesEverwood. He is the widowed husband ofJulia Brown, and is a single father to his two children;EphramandDelia Brown. He is portrayed byTreat Williams. Andy was born and raised in Manhattan, New York as an only child. He knew from a young age that his dream was to become a surgeon but his parents, specifically his father, were very unsupportive of that career path. Because of their lack of support Andy had a distant relationship with his parents and didn't bother to keep in touch after he graduated from medical school. While in medical school Andy was quickly seen as a prodigy, noticed because of his stitching skills. AfterDr. Donald Douglasdecided to mentor him, Andy gained a lot of recognition within the neurosurgery community.

While in medical school Andy was quickly seen as a prodigy, noticed because of his stitching skills. AfterDr. Donald Douglasdecided to mentor him, Andy gained a lot of recognition within the neurosurgery community.

characters.name: Bright Abbott
characters.description: Bright AbbottBiographyFull NameHarold Brighton Abbott IIIAliasesBright(by everyone)BirthdateMay 10, 1985GenderMaleStatusIn a relationship withHannah RogersFamilyHarold Abbott(father)Rose Abbott(mother)Amy Abbott(younger sister)Linda Abbott(aunt)†Hal Abbott(grandfather)†Edna Harper(grandmother)Irv Harper(grandfather)†Carol Roberts(grandmother)Herb Roberts(grandfather)RomancesHannah Rogers(girlfriend)Susie Clark(ex-girlfriend)Francie Tompkins(dated)Jemma Maxwell(dated)Laurie Hudson(asked out)Serena(hook up)Jillian(ex-girlfriend)Ada(ex-girlfriend)OccupationStudentResidenceEverwood, Colorado,United StatesSeries InformationSeasons1•2•3•4Episodes80(+9 credited)First1.01:"Pilot"Last4.22:"Foreverwood (Part 2)"Portrayed byChris PrattBright Abbottis a main character in thefirst,second,thirdandfourthseasons ofthe WBdrama seriesEverwood. He is the son ofHaroldandRose Abbott, andAmy Abbottis his younger sister. He is portrayed byChris Pratt. Bright grew up in Everwood, Colorado with his loving parentsHaroldandRose Abbott, and his younger sisterAmy. They were a very happy family, his parents had a solid relationship and he had a typical siblings rivalry with his sister. Bright met his best friendColin Hartin school at a young age and the two stayed close through school. Bright and Colin both played on the basketball and football varsity teams, and became very popular among their peers. They both had a lot of options when it came to girls and Bright was disappointed when Colin became interested in Amy. This brought Bright closer to his sister though, due to the three of them hanging out more often. Bright is a naturally nice guy, but among his peers he can sometimes show a mean streak. Due to his popularity, he hangs out with the athletes and can be an antagonist towards those who are on a lower social class. Initially Bright and his friends bullyEphram Brownwith immature pranks, often trying to trick him into believing thatAmywanted to date him. A lot of this behaviour stems from his guilt aboutColin's accident, and when Bright confesses his responsibility he is able to get past his aggressive tendencies. Despite their rivalry Bright is protective of his younger sister Amy, and when his friends ignored his wish that they leave her alone, he separated himself from the group.

characters.name: Colin Hart
characters.description: Colin HartBiographyBirthdateOctober, 1986GenderMaleStatusDeceased †FamilyJames Hart(father)Sharon Hart(mother)Laynie Hart(sister)RomancesAmy Abbott(ex-girlfriend)OccupationStudentResidenceEverwood, Colorado,United StatesSeries InformationSeasons1•2Episodes15First1.07:"We Hold These Truths"Last2.16:"Unspoken Truths"Portrayed byMike ErwinColin Hart(portrayed byMike Erwin) is recurring teenage character who appears inEverwoodfrom 2002 to 2004. In the beginning of Everwood, the show reveals thatAmy Abbottwas dating a boy named Colin Hart. There are many flashbacks that reveal what happened to Colin Hart played byMike Erwin. (Flashbacks meaning they happened before Andy, Ephram and Delia moved to Everwood) Colin, Amy and Bright go to a carnival/fair in one of the flashbacks.

characters.name: Delia Brown
characters.description: Delia BrownBiographyAliasesDelilah(by Mrs. Hammerhill)The Rocket(by hockey friends)Rocket Brown(byAndy)BirthdateApril 3, 1993GenderFemaleStatusIn a relationship withCharlie HayesFamilyAndrew Brown(father)Julia Brown(mother) †Ephram Brown(brother)Jacob Hoffman(grandfather)Ruth Hoffman(grandmother)RomancesCharlie Hayes(boyfriend)OccupationStudentResidenceEverwood, Colorado,United StatesSeries InformationSeasons1•2•3•4Episodes76(+13 credited)First1.01:"Pilot"Last4.22:"Foreverwood (Part 2)"Portrayed byVivien CardoneDelia Brownis a main character in thefirst,second,thirdandfourthseasons ofthe WBdrama seriesEverwood. She is the daughter ofAndy Brownand isEphram Brown's younger sister. Delia is the most levelheaded member of the Brown family, despite being the youngest. During the first season Delia has a lot of trouble adjusting to life inEverwood. She initially agrees to go only because her father, Dr. Andy Brown, agreed to get her a pony. Delia is the most levelheaded member of the Brown family, despite being the youngest.

characters.name: Edna Harper
characters.description: Edna HarperBiographyFull NameEdna Abbott HarperAliasesMother(byHarold)GenderMaleStatusWidowedFamilyIrv Harper(former husband)†Hal Abbott(former husband)†Harold AbbottJr.(son)Linda Abbott(daughter)†Amy Abbott(granddaughter)Bright Abbott(grandson)Rose Abbott(daughter-in-law)RomancesHal Abbott(former husband)†Irv Harper(former husband)†OccupationNurseResidenceEverwood, Colorado,United StatesSeries InformationSeasons1•2•3•4Episodes62(+27 credited)First1.01:"Pilot"Last4.22:"Foreverwood (Part 2)"Portrayed byDebra MooneyEdna Abbott Harperis a main character in thefirst,second,thirdandfourthseasons ofthe WBdrama seriesEverwood. She is the mother ofHaroldandLinda Abbott, and works forAndrew Brownat his General Practice. She is portrayed byDebra Mooney. Edna is an older woman with white skin and green eyes. She has a stout figure and smile lines. Her hair is white and she keeps it in a straight bob that frames her face. Edna usually wears her motorcycle gear or her nurse whites, but on her time off she often dresses casually with t-shirts and khakis with tennis shoes.

characters.name: Ephram Brown
characters.description: Ephram BrownBiographyAliasesHam(by classmates)Hamlet(byAmy)Hangdog(byBright)Pussycat(byAda)Jailbait, JB(byMindy)BirthdateJuly 6, 1987GenderMaleStatusIn a relationship withAmy AbbottFamilyAndrew Brown(father)Julia Brown(mother)†Delia Brown(sister)Jacob Hoffman(grandfather)Ruth Hoffman(grandmother)RomancesAmy Abbott(girlfriend)Madison Kellner(ex-girlfriend)Laynie Hart(dated)OccupationStudent atCounty High SchoolResidenceEverwood, Colorado,United StatesSeries InformationSeasons1•2•3•4Episodes88(+1credited)First1.01:"Pilot"Last4.22:"Foreverwood (Part 2)"Portrayed byGregory SmithEphram Brownis a main character in thefirst,second,thirdandfourthseasons ofthe WBdrama seriesEverwood. He is the son ofAndyandJulia Brown, andDelia Brownis his younger sister. He is portrayed byGregory Smith. Ephram doesn't get along with his father a lot of the time, and resents him for being absent for most of his childhood. Over time their relationship develops and they grow closer. When they first arrive in the small town of Everwood, all Ephram wants to do is go back home to New York. Once Ephram goes to school, he meetsAmy Abbottwho he immediately feels attracted to. Unfortunately he doesn't realize that Amy has befriended him in order to convince his dad who used to be a prominent brain surgeon to help her long time boyfriendColin Hartrecover from a coma he had been in since Independence Day during that summer.

characters.name: Hannah Rogers
characters.description: Hannah RogersBiographyBirthdateNovember 3, 1984GenderFemaleStatusIn a relationship withBright AbbottFamilyUnnamed brotherMr. Rogers(father)Mrs. Rogers(mother)RomancesBright Abbott(boyfriend)Topher Cole(ex-boyfriend)OccupationStudentSeries InformationSeasons3•4Episodes38First3.02:"...There Is a Reaction"Last4.22:"Foreverwood (Part 2)"Portrayed bySarah DrewHannah Rogersis a main character in thethirdandfourthseasons ofthe WBdrama seriesEverwood. Her best friend isAmy Abbott, and she datesBright Abbott. She is portrayed bySarah Drew. Hannah grew up in Lakeville, Minnesota with her parents and older brother. She was very close with her father, sharing a love of books, they used to say that he was the book and she was the story. Hannah didn't have many friends but her family was very close and happy. At her eighth birthday party, Hannah's father ended up impulsively punching another father in the face without knowing why. Worried by his behaviour, her father saw a doctor and was later diagnosed with Huntington Disease. As her father's health deteriorated her mother focused on taking care of him, and Hannah's older brother was the one looking after her. Once her older brother moved away for college, no one had the time to look after Hannah, so her parents askedNina Feeneyto take her in, and Hannah moved to Everwood, Colorado. Hannah is a quiet and shy girl who is very self-conscious and insecure. She keeps to herself and is not interested in joining social groups to accrue new friends or popularity. Hannah has an eclectic taste, interested in all films and books ranging from indie to action, hobbies that she uses to monopolize her time. She uses her diary as an outlet for her emotions because she has never had many friends to talk to. She is smart and quick-witted when she's in a comfortable environment. As Hannah relaxes into her new life she connects with more people who help her out of her shell. Her confidence grows and Hannah becomes more secure in who she is as an individual.

She keeps to herself and is not interested in joining social groups to accrue new friends or popularity. Hannah has an eclectic taste, interested in all films and books ranging from indie to action, hobbies that she uses to monopolize her time. She uses her diary as an outlet for her emotions because she has never had many friends to talk to. She is smart and quick-witted when she's in a comfortable environment. As Hannah relaxes into her new life she connects with more people who help her out of her shell. Her confidence grows and Hannah becomes more secure in who she is as an individual.

characters.name: Harold Abbott
characters.description: Harold AbbottBiographyFull NameHarold Abbott Jr.AliasesHal(by friends)Junior(byEdna)Harry(byLinda)BirthdateFebruary 4, 1958GenderMaleStatusMarried toRose AbbottFamilyRose Abbott(wife)Amy Abbott(daughter)Bright Abbott(son)Edna Harper(mother)Hal Abbott(father)†Linda Abbott(older sister)†Irv Harper(step-father)†Carol Roberts(mother-in-law)Herb Roberts(father-in-law)RomancesRose Abbott(wife)OccupationFamily Doctor atBrown & Abbott Medical PracticeOwner ofAbbott's Authentic Bagel Shoppe(former)ResidenceEverwood, Colorado,United StatesSeries InformationSeasons1•2•3•4Episodes85(+4 credited)First1.01:"Pilot"Last4.22:"Foreverwood (Part 2)"Portrayed byTom AmandesDr. Harold Abbott Jr.is a main character in thefirst,second,thirdandfourthseasons ofthe WBdrama seriesEverwood. He is married toRose Abbottand they have two children,BrightandAmy Abbott. He is portrayed byTom Amandes. He was Everwood's only doctor untilAndy Brownmoved to the tow. He is the younger son ofEdna, the younger brother ofLinda Abbott, the husband ofRose Abbottand father toBright,Amyand later of another baby. Harold didn't get along very well withAndy Brownearly on, but eventually became friends with the former neurosurgeon. They spent a lot of time talking and arguing about medical and personal issues. His character at the beginning of the series may seem a little gruff, but in reality, he will prove to be a good and kind man. characters.name: Horace Hempleman
characters.description: Horace HemplemanBiographyGenderMaleStatusDeceased †OccupationDrifterSeries InformationEpisodes1(mentioned)Horace Hemplemanis a mentioned character in thefirstseason ofthe WBdrama seriesEverwood. He was a handsome drifter who vanished in Everwood during the summer of 1972, all that was left was his shoe with a knife through it. They believe thatMarvin Harrisonconfessed to his murder.

characters.name: Jake Hartman
characters.description: Jake HartmanBiographyAliasesDr. Jake(byNina)Jakey(byCameron)Dr. Hartman(by patients)GenderMaleStatusSingleRomancesCameron(ex-girlfriend)Nina Feeney(ex-girlfriend)OccupationGeneral Practitioner atHartman Medical PracticeResidenceEverwood, Colorado,United StatesSeries InformationSeasons3•4Episodes38First3.01:"For Every Action..."Last4.21:"Foreverwood (Part 1)"Portrayed byScott WolfJake Hartmanis a main character in thethirdandfourthseasons ofthe WBdrama seriesEverwood. He is a general practitioner competing withAndrew BrownandHarold Abbott, and datesNina Feeney. He is portrayed byScott Wolf. Jake was a doctor in California before his reputation was put into question, he worked with many Hollywood stars who he filled out many prescriptions for. He took their word when signing off on prescriptions, until one of his high profile patients overdosed. Even though he hadn't technically done anything wrong, his reputation was ruined and he was wracked with guilt. Jake tried to move on but couldn't continue his life as it was before. He decided he needed to move away and start over elsewhere, eventually picking Everwood, Colorado. Without even breaking up withhis girlfriend, Jake packed up and left his life behind for a fresh start, opening a general practice across the country.

He is the husband ofAmanda Hayes, and the father ofCharlie Hayes. John marriedAmandayoung, and they had their sonCharlie. He and Amanda travelled a lot before he suffered from a stroke that left him paralyzed.

characters.name: Julia Brown
characters.description: Julia BrownBiographyBirthdateApril 29, 1958GenderFemaleStatusDeceased †FamilyAndrew Brown(husband)Ephram Brown(son)Delia Brown(daughter)Jacob Hoffman(father)Ruth Hoffman(mother)RomancesAndrew Brown(husband)ResidenceManhattan, New York, United StatesSeries InformationSeasons1Episodes1First1.01:"Pilot"Portrayed byBrenda StrongJulia Brownis a recurring character inEverwood. She is the wife ofAndy Brownand mother ofEphramandDelia Brown. Julia is Andy's late wife as well as Ephram and Delia's mother. Mother and devoted wife, she has always played the role of mother and father to compensate for the too frequent absences of her husband whom she will never blame. Nevertheless, Julia and Andy had a rough patch when he discovered she was having an affair. Julia dies in a car accident on her way to Ephram's piano recital, leaving the family broken.

characters.name: Linda Abbott
characters.description: Linda AbbottBiographyGenderFemaleStatusAliveFamilyHarold Abbott(brother)Rose Abbott(sister-in-law)Amy Abbott(niece)Bright Abbott(nephew)Edna Harper(mother)Hal Abbott(father)†Irv Harper(step-father)†RomancesAndrew Brown(ex-boyfriend)OccupationDoctorResidenceNamibia, AfricaSeries InformationSeasons2Episodes18First2.03:"My Brother's Keeper"Last2.20:"Do or Die"Portrayed byMarcia CrossLinda Abbottis a recurring character in thesecondseason ofthe WBdrama seriesEverwood. She is the older sister ofHarold Abbott, who had recently returned from overseas and joined the family practice. She is portrayed byMarcia Cross. Linda is a beautiful young woman with pale white skin and green eyes. She has straight, bright red hair that she keeps past her shoulders with face framing bangs. She is tall and thin, often dresses in nice blouses and skirts. InIs There a Doctor in the House?,WhileBrightis having his appendix removed,Haroldtells him the story of how he broke his arm when he was little. He tells Bright that they had just gotten a coloured television and the first thing they watched was a superman cartoon.

characters.description: Madison KellnerBiographyAliasesMaddy(by friends)BirthdateApril 5, 1983GenderFemaleStatusSingleFamilyUnnamed parentsRomancesJay(ex-boyfriend)Ephram Brown(ex-boyfriend)Alex Brocco(ex-boyfriend)OccupationStudentResidenceEverwood, Colorado,United StatesSeries InformationSeasons2•3Episodes19(+1 deleted scenes)First2.04:"East Meets West"Last3.17:"Fate Accomplis"Portrayed bySarah LancasterMadison Kellneris a recurring character in thesecondandthirdseasons ofthe WBdrama seriesEverwood. She is the babysitter ofDelia Brownand datedEphram Brown. She is portrayed bySarah Lancaster. Madison is a pretty young woman with white skin and hazel eyes. She has long light brown hair that she keeps straight with high-lights and past shoulder length. Madison dresses in a casual style, often in t-shirts with baggy jeans and sneakers. Her main accessories are belts and she wears a natural minimal make-up look.

characters.name: Marvin Harrison
characters.description: Marv HarrisonBiographyFull NameMarvin HarrisonAliasesMarv(by everyone)Judge(by everone)GenderMaleStatusWidowedFamilyPeaches Harrison(wife)Harold Abbott(god-son)RomancesPeaches Harrison(wife)OccupationJudgeResidenceEverwood, Colorado,United StatesSeries InformationSeasons1Episodes1Appearance1.17:"Everwood Confidential"Portrayed byLuke AskewMarv Harrisonis a guest character inan episodein thefirstseason ofthe WBdrama seriesEverwood. He wasHal Abbott's best friend and has senile dementia. He is portrayed byLuke Askew. While getting his flu shot he confesses toAndyandEdnathat he had killed someone. When they call the police Marv is arrested as they believe that he killedHorace Hempleman, their longest missing person case in Everwood. As they keep going through the investigation, they find that Marv hadn't killed a person, but his dog.
